case_title: DAGGETT, MAUREEN et al VS LEPPER, SHARON, HEREIN SUED AS LEPPER SUSAN. et al

docket_entries.description: NON-SERVICE REPORT FILED BY PROCESS SERVER FOR PLTF MAUREEN DAGGETT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAGGETT, MAUREEN BENNETT, NATHANAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEPPER, SHARON, HEREIN SUED AS LEPPER SUSAN. ZIMMERN, JOHANN DEFENDANTS WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEPPER, SHARON, HEREIN SUED AS LEPPER SUSAN. ZIMMERN, JOHANN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT DAGGETT, MAUREEN BENNETT, NATHANAEL $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,122.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NON-SERVICE REPORT FILED BY PROCESS SERVER FOR PLTF NATHANAEL BENNETT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY LEPPER, SHARON, HEREIN SUED AS LEPPER SUSAN. ZIMMERN, JOHANN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DAGGETT, MAUREEN BENNETT, NATHANAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY DAGGETT, MAUREEN BENNETT, NATHANAEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEPPER, SHARON, HEREIN SUED AS LEPPER SUSAN. ZIMMERN, JOHANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERN, JOHANN
